scope.question: Review taxonomy mapping, synthesis boundaries, and safety limitations for the D+Q bone endpoint synthesis candidate.

inputs.summary: Coordinator requested supervisor-agent review of taxonomy mapping, synthesis boundary, and safety limitations for the D+Q bone endpoint synthesis candidate.
Reviewed candidate lifecycle, required lanes, proposed synthesis-group ledger, and evidence-review linkage.
Reviewed the six endpoint-specific synthesis groups proposed by the candidate: CTx, short-term P1NP, 20-week P1NP, BMD, SASP, and safety.
Read the required runbooks, synthesis rules, agent-run schemas, candidate-change schema, evidence-review schema, and synthesis-group schema before writing review records.

outputs.summary: Completed three supervisor-agent review lanes for the D+Q bone endpoint synthesis candidate, set the candidate to in_review, linked the three evidence reviews, and regenerated latest exports. All three lanes are complete, accepting, non-blocking, and have no open major or critical findings.

proposed_records.rationale: Moved the candidate to in_review and linked the three active supervisor-agent evidence review records.
Records the completed taxonomy-mapping supervisor review for the endpoint synthesis candidate.
Records the completed synthesis-boundary supervisor review for the endpoint synthesis candidate.
Records the completed safety-limitations supervisor review for the endpoint synthesis candidate.
